code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a ring of icons with endpoint markers A and B
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_clockwise_arc_shape_count: Starting at marker A and moving clockwise to marker B, how many "{target_shape_name}" icons are strictly between A and B?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_counterclockwise_arc_shape: Starting at marker A and moving counterclockwise to marker B, how many "{target_shape_name}" icons are strictly between A and B?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text: How many "{target_shape_name}" icons are closer to marker A than to marker B? Do not count icons equally far from A and B.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every counted "{target_shape_name}" icon strictly between A and B along the {direction} arc
code_prompt_defaults.nearest_marker_annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding boxes in image pixel coordinates for every counted "{target_shape_name}" icon closer to marker A than marker B
code_prompt_defaults.nearest_marker_answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
